framework_overview.purpose: Reconcile CUOS Foundation Laws (AAIS) with UCDD Standards Bundle (ULX IDE) for service orchestration integration
framework_overview.reconciliation_principle: Preserve constitutional integrity of both systems while enabling cooperative operation through API boundaries
framework_overview.governance_model: Dual Constitutional Authority with API Boundary Governance

cuos_framework.name: Cognitive Unified OS Foundation Laws
core_principles: Origin Integrity Law - Nothing enters raw, all must be Forge-originated
Foundation Laws - Non-negotiable laws take precedence over architecture
Adaptive constraints - Learns within strictly enforced boundaries
Fail-closed default - No silent reroutes or hidden fallbacks

ucdd_framework.name: UCDD Standards Bundle v1.2.0
ucdd_framework.authority_chain: CIS Core → GKS → Constitutional Schemas → Integrated Components
ucdd_framework.governance_scope: ULX IDE integrated components and constitutional artifacts

law_to_standard_mapping.reconciliation: API boundary serves as admission control point. ULX IDE requests must provide conformance evidence before AAIS processes them.
law_to_standard_mapping.implementation: API gateway validates UCDD conformance evidence before forwarding to AAIS Forge

law_to_standard_mapping.reconciliation: AAIS execution governance operates within delegated authority from ULX IDE via API boundaries.
law_to_standard_mapping.implementation: Authority delegation tokens passed in API headers, AAIS respects ULX authority boundaries

law_to_standard_mapping.reconciliation: Both systems maintain audit trails. API boundary synchronizes observability events.
law_to_standard_mapping.implementation: Shared audit log format, cross-system event correlation via API boundary

law_to_standard_mapping.reconciliation: Violations handled according to respective frameworks. API boundary communicates violation status.
law_to_standard_mapping.implementation: Standardized violation reporting format, cross-system violation escalation protocol

law_to_standard_mapping.reconciliation: Execution consistency maintained through traceability linkage across API boundary.
law_to_standard_mapping.implementation: Request IDs traceable across both systems, execution state synchronization

law_to_standard_mapping.reconciliation: AAIS adaptation operates within UCDD AI agent compliance constraints.
law_to_standard_mapping.implementation: AAIS adaptive processes validate against UCDD compliance rules

api_boundary_governance.boundary_definition: HTTP/REST API between ULX IDE (client) and AAIS (service)

ulx_ide_domain.scope: Request initiation, authority delegation, evidence provision

aais_domain.scope: Request processing, execution governance, adaptive behavior

shared_boundary.scope: Protocol translation, evidence synchronization, violation escalation

constitutional_conflicts.resolution: API boundary validates UCDD conformance evidence, then AAIS applies Forge evaluation
Authority delegation tokens establish cross-system authority recognition
Violations handled in respective domains, communicated via boundary protocol

escalation_hierarchy: Level 1 - Domain-specific violation (handled within respective system)
Level 2 - Boundary violation (handled by reconciliation protocol)
Level 3 - Cross-system constitutional conflict (escalated to constitutional authorities)
Level 4 - Constitutional emergency (requires joint constitutional authority intervention)

audit_trail_synchronization.ulx_ide_audit: UCDD-compliant audit trail for ULX IDE operations
audit_trail_synchronization.aais_audit: CUOS-compliant audit trail for AAIS operations
audit_trail_synchronization.synchronization: API boundary correlates events via shared request IDs and timestamps

conformance_evidence.ulx_evidence: UCDD conformance evidence generated by ULX IDE
conformance_evidence.aais_evidence: CUOS compliance evidence generated by AAIS
conformance_evidence.synchronization: Cross-system evidence package maintained at API boundary

traceability_linkage.synchronization: Unified traceability graph spanning both systems

reconciliation_guarantees.constitutional_integrity: Both systems maintain their constitutional frameworks
reconciliation_guarantees.authority_preservation: Authority chains remain intact within respective domains
reconciliation_guarantees.boundary_transparency: API boundary operations are fully observable and auditable
reconciliation_guarantees.violation_handling: Violations handled according to respective frameworks with cross-system communication
reconciliation_guarantees.evidence_completeness: Complete evidence package maintained for both systems
reconciliation_guarantees.adaptation_constraints: AAIS adaptation operates within UCDD AI agent compliance

deliverables: Complete CUOS to UCDD mapping document
Monitoring and alerting for constitutional violations

constitutional_authorities.ulx_constitutional_authority: CIS Core → UCDD Standards Bundle Governance
constitutional_authorities.reconciliation_authority: Joint Constitutional Council (proposed for cross-system disputes)

next_steps: Complete detailed CUOS Foundation Laws documentation review
Map remaining CUOS laws to UCDD standards
Design API boundary specification with constitutional validation
Define infrastructure requirements for reconciliation layer
